name: Old Merchant
description: A weathered old man in a patched cloak, leaning on a gnarled staff.

name: Barkeep
description: A burly woman with strong arms and a no-nonsense expression.

name: Giant Rat
description: A rat the size of a dog, with matted fur and yellow fangs.

name: Skeleton
description: An animated skeleton clutching a rusted blade. Its eye sockets glow with pale fire.

name: Gate Guard
description: A bored-looking guard in chainmail, idly picking at his nails.

name: Forest Hermit
description: An elderly hermit in tattered robes, eyes bright with hidden knowledge.

name: Wolf
description: A large grey wolf with intelligent eyes and bared teeth.
